arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Real Madrid - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as the Gunners and Los Blancos meet for the first time in almost a decade plus updates from Bayern Munich vs Inter Milan
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Real Madrid in Champions League quarter-final clash. Plus updates from Bayern Munich vs Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: 'I'm making it happen': Rio Ferdinand names three key Arsenal summer targets he wants to see at Manchester United
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both likely to strengthen their ranks when the summer transfer window reopens. Arsenal aren’t exactly having a bad season, but...

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name XI to face Arsenal
arts.sum: The group of players set to be depended upon by the Real Madrid coaching staff to get the better of Arsenal on Tuesday evening has been unveiled online. And it…

arts.ttl: Injured Real Madrid superstar sets personal challenge – ‘Be ready by the end of May’
arts.sum: Injured Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal has revealed the personal challenge he has set for himself as he continues his recovery from a serious knee injury.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Arsenal vs Real Madrid, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Arsenal in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League ’s Quarterfinals. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Alaba, Camavinga, Modric, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta clearout gathers momentum but Arsenal star may miss out on dream transfer
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is set to revamp Arsenal's midfield this summer with Jorginho and Thomas Partey heading for the exit but the latter's dream next move has been complicated

arts.ttl: Newcastle star linked with Real Madrid, Barcelona & Man City expresses desire to leave
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali is reported to have informed the club of his desire to leave, which could pave the way for summer investment in a replacement.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams has already told Arsenal what they want to hear amid Andrea Berta transfer meeting
arts.sum: Nico Williams has denied wanting to play with his Spanish teammates at Barcelona - one of the many clubs interested in the winger. Despite the interviewer's best attempt to get the young winger to make a comment on playing for Barcelona, Williams continued to deny any interest in playing with his national squad teammates at club level.

arts.ttl: Arsenal identify Nico Williams transfer alternative as Mikel Arteta secret weapon emerges
arts.sum: “He believes the club need a new player for the left and we know he has already held talks over Nico Williams, but they are doing their work on other options. Arsenal look to have started considering transfer alternatives to Nico Williams ahead of the summer window.
